vibe: Premium, professional, trustworthy, editorial D2C cosmetics brand style
target_audience: Brand owners, B2B buyers looking for high-quality, trusted cosmetic manufacturing.

layout.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left side heavily text-focused with generous negative space. Right side features an immersive, soft-edged image of premium manufacturing facility with a slight parallax effect.
layout.product_grid: Grid of 2-4 columns (mobile-first). Square image aspect ratios (aspect-square). Cardless design - images sit directly on the background with text cleanly aligned underneath. Minimalist hover states.
layout.about_section: Editorial magazine layout. Text wrapped around large, high-quality images. Utilizing the Tetris grid mode for asymmetrical visual tension.
layout.certifications: Subtle marquee or horizontal scrolling list of minimal, monochrome certification badges. Opacity 50% to not distract, but visible for trust.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners or very subtle rounding (rounded-sm). Primary: bg-[#A67B5B] text-white hover:bg-[#8B664B]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#A67B5B] text-[#A67B5B]. Use data-testid on all buttons.
components.cards: Avoid Shadcn default cards. Use bare semantic HTML tags with subtle borders (border-[#E5E3D8]) and zero shadow, allowing the background to flow through.
components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80). Border bottom 1px solid #E5E3D8. Minimalist links, primary CTA. Mobile menu should be full screen.
components.filters: Horizontal scrollable pill-shaped buttons or clean inline text links with active state underlined. Avoid heavy dropdowns for category selection to keep it D2C style.
components.forms: Minimalist borders. Floating labels or simple clean top labels. Input fields with border-b only (material-style) or very subtle all-around borders with no background.

motion.reveal: Fade in and slight upward translate on scroll for text blocks and images.

images.description: Luxurious organic skincare products on a natural stone pedestal. Use for the main hero or premium intro.
Clean, modern cosmetic manufacturing facility. Use for 'About Us' or manufacturing capabilities section.
Organic clay texture. Use as a background pattern for specific sections to break up solid colors.

media.icons_instruction: Use Duotone or Light weights for a delicate, premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion lenis`
Ensure `Cormorant Garamond` and `Outfit` fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the UI without Shadcn 'Card' components—use semantic HTML and Tailwind directly for layouts to keep it editorial.
For the product catalog, use a category filter (Face Care, Hair Care, etc.). Display products as 500x500 square images. Do not wrap them in bulky cards; keep the design cardless.
Create a 'Certifications' horizontal scrolling marquee strip utilizing simple HTML/CSS or framer-motion. Include texts/icons for ISO, GMP, FDA.
Include an 'About Us' section with stats: Established 1998, 1.5-5 Cr turnover, 250+ products, Sulphate/Paraben-free.
Add a floating WhatsApp CTA icon fixed to the bottom right of the screen.
Ensure all buttons and actionable elements have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="quote-submit-button"`).
Maintain strict accessibility standards with contrast ratios.
